global.retrying_answer_submission_check_network: Kuyesanso kutumizira mayankho ... Onani kulumikizana kwanu ndi netiweki ...
global.check_webgl_description: Zikuwoneka kuti msakatuli wanu sagwirizana ndi WebGL. Gwiritsani ntchito ulalo womwe uli pansipa kuti muthetse vutoli.
global.expiry_alert_title: Khodi yanu yolembetsa yatsala pang'ono kutha
global.expiry_alert_text: Khodi yanu yolembetsa itha ntchito posachedwa (masiku {daysValue} atsala). Mukatha ntchito, simudzakhalanso ndi mwayi wogwiritsa ntchito akaunti yanu. Chonde funsani woyang'anira gulu lanu kapena mlangizi kuti mudziwe momwe mungapezere mwayi wowonjezera.
global.under_maintenance_message: Panopa tikukonza zokonza kuti zikuthandizeni kukonza bwino zinthu.
global.under_maintenance_description: Chonde bwereraninso nthawi ina. Tikupepesa pazovuta zilizonse.
global.delete_tranlate_confirmation: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa zomasulirazi?
global.injector_activity_directions: Chonde lembani majakisoni osiyanitsa ndi amchere payekhapayekha ndi voliyumu yoyenera kuti muyese mayeso a {bodyPartName} . Ma voliyumu akasankhidwa, sankhani batani la "NEXT" kuti mupitirize.
global.patient_position_directions: Chonde sankhani malo odwala omwe mungafune kuti muyesedwe ndi {bodyPartName} . Pamene udindo wasankhidwa, kusankha "NEXT" batani kupitiriza.
global.patient_landmarking_directions: Pogwiritsa ntchito mabatani a laser ndi navigation, chonde sunthani wodwalayo ndi tebulo pamalo omwe mukufuna kuti muwawonetse kuti alowe m'malo mkati mwa mayeso a {bodyPartName} ndikusankha "Confirm Landmark". Chizindikiro chikasankhidwa, sankhani batani la "NEXT" kuti mupitirize.
global.patient_position_is_incorrect: Malo omwe mwasankha odwala ndi olakwika.  Chonde pangani chisankho chanu kuchokera m'malo omwe angakhale odwala omwe ali pansipa.
global.delete_all_point_selection: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa zosankhidwa zonse?
global.delete_all_sat_band: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa zone yonse ya sat band?
global.set_scan_description: Ngati mukufuna kugwiritsa ntchito njira ya "Set Delay" podziwa nthawi ya gawo, Chonde ikani kuchedwa kwa jambulani pamanja mafunso omwe mukufuna.
global.is_contrast_duration_greater_than_scan_d: Sikani Nthawi (UI) singakhale yoposa nthawi ya Kusiyanitsa (Injector UI).
global.is_contrast_duration_longer_than_scan_du: Kusiyanitsa sikungapitirire masekondi 5 kuposa nthawi ya sikani.
global.image_duration_shorter_than_contrast_dur: Kutalika kwa chithunzi ndi nthawi yosiyanitsa.
global.delete_this_profile: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa mbiriyi?
global.save_all_patient_positions: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kusunga malo onse odwala a ziwalo zonse za thupi lachitsanzo chosankhidwa?
global.delete_selected_digital_localizer: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kufufuta makina osankhidwa a digito?

TermsAndConditions.terms_and_conditions_of_use_description: Tsambali, www.scanlabmr.com, ndi la MediSim Technologies, LLC, Florida Limited Liability Company (“MST,” “ife,” “athu,” ndi “ife”). Munthawi yonseyi yogwiritsiridwa ntchito, mawu oti "inu" ndi "anu" amatanthauza wogwiritsa ntchito yemwe amabwera patsamba lino. Izi ndi zikhalidwe zogwiritsiridwa ntchito (“Terms of Use”) zimakhazikitsa malamulo oti mugwiritse ntchito Tsambali. Mwa kulowa kapena kugwiritsa ntchito Tsambali mwanjira iliyonse, mukuwonetsa kuvomereza kwanu: (i) Migwirizano Yogwiritsiridwa Ntchito, (ii) Mfundo Zazinsinsi ("Mfundo Zazinsinsi"), ndi (iii) zidziwitso zilizonse zamalamulo, mikhalidwe kapena malangizo omwe ali mkati mwa Tsambali. Migwirizano imeneyi imagwiranso ntchito pa Webusaiti yathu kapena ntchito ina iliyonse yapaintaneti ya MST kapena pulogalamu yomwe imayika ulalo ku Migwirizano Yogwiritsa Ntchitoyi, komanso zinthu zilizonse, ma widgits, mapulagini, zomwe zili, kukopera kapena ntchito zina zomwe zimaperekedwa, kapena ntchito ina yapaintaneti ya MST kapena kugwiritsa ntchito (pamodzi, "Site"). Migwirizano Yogwiritsiridwa Ntchitoyi idzagwira ntchito mosasamala kanthu momwe mumapezera kapena kugwiritsa ntchito Tsambali, kaya kudzera pa kompyuta, piritsi, foni yam'manja, wotchi yanzeru, console, kapena zina. mapulogalamu aliwonse am'manja omwe amayika ulalo wa tsambali. Ngati simukugwirizana ndi Migwirizano iyi kapena Mfundo Zazinsinsi, chonde musagwiritse ntchito Tsambali ndikutuluka pano.
TermsAndConditions.important_legal_information_about_privac: tsatirani kugwiritsa ntchito kwanu Tsambali, khalani gawo limodzi la mgwirizano wanu ndi ife, ndipo zimaphatikizidwa ndi Migwirizano iyi. Muyenera kuwerenga Mfundo Zazinsinsi mosamala musanagwiritse ntchito Tsamba lathu popeza, pogwiritsa ntchito Tsambali, mudzakhala mukuvomereza chilichonse chomwe chili mu Migwirizano iyi, kuphatikiza zomwe zili mu Mfundo Zazinsinsi.
TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms: Kusintha kwa Migwirizano iyi ndi Tsamba Lathu
TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms_description: Titha kuwonjezera, kusintha, kuchotsa kapena kusintha Tsambali nthawi iliyonse mwakufuna kwathu. Timasunga ufulu, nthawi iliyonse komanso nthawi, pazifukwa zilizonse, kusintha Migwirizano Yogwiritsa Ntchito. Titha kutumiza kapena kuwonetsa zidziwitso zakusintha kwa Migwirizano Yogwiritsa Ntchito Patsambali kapena tingakudziwitse zosinthazi. Zikangotumizidwa, zosinthazi ku Migwirizano Yogwiritsiridwa ntchito zimakhala zogwira mtima nthawi yomweyo. Ngati kusintha kulikonse komwe tikupanga sikuvomerezeka kwa inu, siyani kugwiritsa ntchito Tsambali. Kugwiritsiridwa ntchito kulikonse kwa Tsambali pambuyo pakusintha kwa Migwirizano Yathu Yogwiritsiridwa Ntchito kudzawonetsa kuvomereza kwanu pazosinthazo. Muyenera kuyang'ananso nthawi ndi nthawi ndikuwunikanso Migwirizano iyi kuti mudziwe zaufulu ndi zomwe muli nazo panopo zomwe zikugwirizana ndi mgwirizano wanu ndi ife. Palibe mu Migwirizano imeneyi yomwe imakupatsirani ufulu kapena maubwino ena ena.
TermsAndConditions.access_and_use_description: Migwirizano iyi imagwira ntchito kwa onse ogwiritsa ntchito Tsambali. Timapereka Zomwe zili Patsamba (zofotokozedwa m'munsimu) monga mwaulemu kwa ogwiritsa ntchito athu ndipo tikufuna kuti zizingochitika mwachisawawa, zodziwitsa zambiri komanso zophunzitsira. Zambiri kuchokera patsamba lino zitha kusintha popanda kuzindikira. Timakulolani kuti mulowe ndikugwiritsa ntchito Zomwe zili pa Siteyi pazolinga zanu, osati zamalonda zokha, ndipo potero tikukupatsani chilolezo chotsitsa ndi kusindikiza Zomwe zili pa Tsambali kuti muwone, kuwerenga, ndi kusunga zinthuzo kuti musagwiritse ntchito malonda, maphunziro. Kukopera kwina kulikonse, kugawa, kutumizanso, kapena kusinthidwa kwa Site Content, kaya pamagetsi kapena mwanjira ina, ndikoletsedwa popanda chilolezo chathu cholembedwa. Mukuvomereza kuti simudzaphatikizira, kusokoneza, kutembenuza mainjiniya kapena kusintha zina zapatsamba, chilichonse chomwe chili patsamba lino kapena pulogalamu yapatsamba. Kugwiritsiridwa ntchito kulikonse kosaloledwa kapena koletsedwa kungapangitse wolakwirayo kukhala ndi mlandu wokhudza boma ndi kuimbidwa milandu pansi pa malamulo ogwiritsidwa ntchito.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description1: Kuti mugwiritse ntchito zina za Tsambali mungafunike kupanga dzina lanu lolowera ndi mawu achinsinsi. Ngati pakufunika mawonekedwe a Tsambali, MST idzakupangirani mawu achinsinsi ndipo mudzapemphedwa kuti mupange dzina lanu ndi mawu achinsinsi. Muli ndi udindo pazolumikizana zilizonse ndi Tsambali zomwe zimachitika kudzera muakaunti yanu, mosasamala kanthu kuti kugwiritsa ntchito kotereku sikuloledwa kapena ndi munthu wina. Chonde sungani dzina lanu lolowera ndi mawu achinsinsi otetezedwa ndipo musalole wina aliyense kuti agwiritse ntchito zambiri za akaunti yanu kuti alowe patsamba.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description2: Maakaunti a ogwiritsa ntchito akuyenera kugwiritsidwa ntchito ndi munthu yekhayo amene wagula laisensi kapena ndi munthu amene kampani yamupatsa nambala imodzi yalayisensi. Malayisensi a ScanLab saloledwa kugawidwa kuti agwiritse ntchito kangapo. Chilolezo cha ScanLab sichiloledwa kugwiritsidwa ntchito ngati njira yophunzitsira kapena malangizo popanda chilolezo cholembedwa ndi ScanLab. Kuphwanya kulikonse kwa mawuwa kudzachititsa kuti agwire ntchito zalamulo ndikuyimitsa kugwiritsa ntchito ndi ntchito nthawi yomweyo.
TermsAndConditions.eligibility_description: Muyenera kukhala ndi zaka zosachepera 18 kuti mugwiritse ntchito Tsambali. Pogwiritsa ntchito Tsambali, mumatsimikizira kuti muli ndi zaka 18 kapena kuposerapo ndipo ndinu okhoza komanso oyenerera kulowa muzotsatira, mikhalidwe, maudindo, zitsimikiziro, zowonetsera, ndi zitsimikizo zomwe zafotokozedwa mu Migwirizano Yogwiritsira Ntchitoyi, ndi kumvera ndi kutsata Migwirizano iyi.
TermsAndConditions.intellectual_property_rights_description: Malo, Zolemba Patsamba ndi zizindikiro, zizindikiro za ntchito ndi ma logo omwe ali mmenemo ("Zizindikiro"), ndi ake kapena ali ndi chilolezo ku MST, malinga ndi ufulu wazinthu zaluntha pansi pa United States ndi malamulo akunja ndi misonkhano yapadziko lonse. Simungapeze chiwongola dzanja chilichonse kapena maufulu pazamasamba kapena Zizindikiro zomwe zili patsamba lino. MST ili ndi ufulu wonse womwe sunaperekedwe mwachindunji mu Tsambali ndi Zomwe zili patsamba. Ngati mutsitsa kapena kusindikiza kopi ya Tsambali kuti mugwiritse ntchito nokha kapena pamaphunziro, muyenera kusunga kukopera ndi zidziwitso zina zomwe zilimo. Mukuvomera kuti musazengereze, kuletsa kapena kusokoneza chilichonse chokhudzana ndi chitetezo cha Tsambali kapena zinthu zomwe zimalepheretsa kapena kuletsa kugwiritsa ntchito kapena kukopera Zomwe zili patsamba lililonse kapena kuyika malire pakugwiritsa ntchito Tsambali kapena Zomwe zili patsamba.

TermsAndConditions.disclaimer_description1: Sitikutsimikizira kuti Tsambali lidzakhala lopanda kusokonezedwa kapena lopanda cholakwika, kuti zolakwika zidzakonzedwa, kapena kuti Tsambali kapena ma seva omwe amapangitsa kuti lizipezeka (kapena tsamba lililonse lolumikizidwa) alibe ma virus kapena zinthu zina zovulaza kapena kuti Tsamba lathu, maseva, kapena masamba olumikizidwa azipezeka nthawi zonse. Kudalira Zomwe zili patsamba lililonse zimachitika mwangozi mwanu nokha popanda mangawa ku MST. Mukuganiza mtengo wonse wazinthu zonse zofunika, kukonza kapena kukonza zida zilizonse zomwe mumagwiritsa ntchito kuti mupeze Tsambali. Mfundo Zazinsinsi izi zidzagwira ntchito mosasamala kanthu momwe mumapezera kapena kugwiritsa ntchito Tsambali, kaya kudzera pa kompyuta, piritsi, foni yam'manja, wotchi yanzeru, console, kapena ayi. Mukalowa patsamba lathu, mumavomereza Mfundo Zazinsinsi izi ndi {termsLink} yathu, kuphatikiza kusonkhanitsa kwathu, kugwiritsa ntchito, ndi kugawana zambiri zanu, monga tafotokozera pansipa. Ngati muli ndi mafunso okhudza mfundo zathu kapena kugwiritsa ntchito tsamba lathu, chonde titumizireni pa {imelo}
Privacy.information_we_collect_description: Timasonkhanitsa zidziwitso kuchokera kwa inu m'njira zingapo, kuphatikiza mukasankha kugawana nafe zambiri poziyika pa Webusayiti yathu, kudzera muzolemba zomwe mungapange, komanso kugwiritsa ntchito njira zodzipangira zokha.
Privacy.information_you_provide_description: Titha kukufunsani ndipo mutha kusankha kutipatsa zambiri zanu, monga dzina lanu loyamba ndi lomaliza, adilesi ya imelo, adilesi yamakalata, ndi nambala yafoni. Titha kusonkhanitsa izi m'malo osiyanasiyana, kuphatikiza kudzera pamasamba athu olembetsa ndi kulowa, tsamba la "Contact Us", kapena mbali zina za Tsamba lathu.
Privacy.automated_information_collection_descrip: Titha kutolera zinthu zina mukayendera kapena kugwiritsa ntchito tsamba lathu. Izi zingaphatikizepo adilesi yanu ya IP (kapena chizindikiritso china chapadera cha chipangizocho, kuphatikiza chomwe titha kukupatsani); zambiri za msakatuli wanu, makina ogwiritsira ntchito, ndi zida; malo anu, ngati alipo; ulalo womwe umakufikitsani ku Tsamba lathu; zochita zanu patsamba lathu, kuphatikiza zomwe mumakonda; ndi mfundo zina zodula mitengo, monga tsiku ndi nthawi ya ulendo wanu. Titha kugwiritsa ntchito matekinoloje osiyanasiyana kuti titolere zokha zidziwitso, monga makeke, ma beacon, zolembedwa, msakatuli wosindikizira zala, GPS, iBeacons, ndi ETags (kapena "ma tag azinthu"). Ma cookie (kapena "chinthu chogawidwa kwanuko") ndi fayilo ya data yomwe imayikidwa pa chipangizo chanu mukamayendera tsamba lathu. Msakatuli wanu, kapena mapulogalamu ena (kuphatikiza Adobe Flash), akhoza kukulolani kukana kapena kuchotsa makeke, koma ngati mutero, mbali zina za Webusaiti yathu sizingagwire bwino ntchito, ndipo mwina sitingathe kukumbukira zomwe mumakonda nthawi ina mukadzabweranso. Titha kugwiritsanso ntchito zipika za seva yapaintaneti kuti tisonkhanitse ndikusunga zambiri zakugwiritsa ntchito Tsambali. Mukayendera tsamba lathu kuchokera pa foni yam'manja, ngati foni yam'manja, titha kutenganso zambiri kuchokera pa chipangizo chanu, kuphatikiza komwe muli, chozindikiritsa chipangizocho, komanso zambiri zokhudza netiweki yanu yam'manja.
Privacy.user_accounts_description: Kuti mugwiritse ntchito zina za Tsambali mungafunike kupanga dzina lanu lolowera ndi mawu achinsinsi. Muli ndi udindo pazolumikizana zilizonse ndi Tsambali zomwe zimachitika kudzera muakaunti yanu, mosasamala kanthu kuti kugwiritsa ntchito kotereku sikuloledwa kapena ndi munthu wina. Chonde sungani dzina lanu lolowera ndi mawu achinsinsi otetezedwa ndipo musalole wina aliyense kuti agwiritse ntchito zambiri za akaunti yanu kuti alowe patsamba.

Privacy.analytics_services_description: Tsamba lathu limagwiritsa ntchito ma analytics a chipani chachitatu, kuphatikiza, koma osati malire, Google Analytics. Ntchitozi zitha kutsata zomwe mumachita pa intaneti pakapita nthawi komanso pamawebusayiti osiyanasiyana. Ntchitozi zimatithandiza kukonza tsamba lathu. Ntchitozi zithanso kutilola kukupatsirani zotsatsa kapena zinthu zina zomwe mungakonde kutengera zomwe mumachita pa intaneti. Mutha kudziwa zambiri za Google Analytics ndi zisankho zanu pa ulalowu. Ngati mungafune kudziwa zambiri za malonda omwe mukupita nawo omwe angakhale otengera zochita zanu pa intaneti (ndi zisankho zomwe mungagwiritse ntchito pamasamba ena ndi otsatsa) mungafune kupita ku {networkAdvertisingLink} kapena {digitalAdvertisingLink} mawebusayiti. Kuti mutuluke kuti musamatsatidwe ndi Google Analytics pamasamba onse, pitani: {googleOptOutLink}.
Privacy.how_we_use_the_information_description: Timagwiritsa ntchito zomwe timapeza kuchokera kwa inu kuti tikupatseni ntchito zomwe mukufuna komanso kukupatsani zomwe zingakusangalatseni, monga zambiri zantchito, zolemba zamakalata, ndi zotsatsa zapadera. Titha kugwiritsanso ntchito zomwe timapeza kuti tisinthe zomwe mwakumana nazo patsamba lathu, kupereka chithandizo kwamakasitomala, komanso kukhazikitsa Migwirizano Yathu Yogwiritsa Ntchito.
Privacy.how_and_when_we_share_information: Momwe ndi Nthawi Zomwe Timagawana Zambiri ndi Anthu Ena
Privacy.how_and_when_we_share_information_descri: Titha kugawana zomwe timapeza ndi anthu ena pazifukwa zosiyanasiyana. Mwachitsanzo, titha kugawana zambiri ndi sukulu yanu, bungwe kapena olemba anzawo ntchito komanso ndi othandizira omwe amatithandiza pabizinesi yathu. Titha kugawananso zambiri ngati kufunidwa ndi lamulo kapena kukwaniritsa lamulo lililonse, malamulo, subpoena, pempho la boma, kapena njira zina zamalamulo. Tithanso kugawana zambiri ndi anthu ena, kuphatikiza okhazikitsa malamulo, kuteteza Tsamba lathu komanso kutsimikizira Migwirizano Yathu Yogwiritsa Ntchito. Tilinso ndi ufulu wogawana zidziwitso zomwe timasonkhanitsa ndi mabungwe athu ndi othandizira athu komanso ndi eni ake onse pakachitika kuphatikiza, kuphatikiza, kugulitsa katundu wathu, kapena kusintha kwina mubizinesi yathu.
Privacy.co_branded_areas_description: Titha kupereka magawo ena atsamba lathu molumikizana ndi anthu ena, monga otsatsa. "Madera odziwika" awa adzazindikiritsa gulu lachitatu. Ngati mungasankhe kugwiritsa ntchito madera omwe ali ndi mayina awa, titha kugawana zambiri zanu ndi munthu wina yemwe wadziwika, ndipo gulu lachitatu lithanso kutenga zambiri kuchokera kwa inu, kuwonjezera pazomwe timasonkhanitsa, monga tafotokozera pamwambapa. Muyenera kuunikanso zinsinsi za anthu ena odziwika kuti mumvetsetse momwe amasonkhanitsira ndikugwiritsa ntchito zidziwitso.
Privacy.links_to_third_party_sites_description: Tsamba lathu litha kukhala ndi maulalo amasamba ena kapena ntchito zina zapaintaneti. Sitili ndi udindo pamawebusayiti ena ndi ntchito zina, ndipo atha kusonkhanitsa ndikugwiritsa ntchito zambiri za inu. Muyenera kuwonanso zachinsinsi za anthu ena musanagwiritse ntchito mawebusayiti kapena ntchito zawo kuti mumvetsetse momwe amasonkhanitsira ndi kugwiritsa ntchito zidziwitso.
Privacy.third_party_tracking_and_do_not_track_de: Anthu ena atha kugwiritsa ntchito ukadaulo wolondolera patsamba lathu, zomwe zingaphatikizepo kusonkhanitsa zambiri zazomwe mumachita pa intaneti pakapita nthawi komanso patsamba la anthu ena. Mfundo Zazinsinsi izi sizikugwira ntchito paukadaulo wa chipani chachitatu chifukwa mwina sitingathe kuzilamulira ndipo tilibe udindo nazo. Do Not Track ndiukadaulo womwe umathandizira ogwiritsa ntchito kusiya kutsatira masamba omwe sapitako. Pakadali pano, sitiyang'anira kapena kuchitapo kanthu pokhudzana ndiukadaulo wa Do Not Track.
Privacy.updating_your_information_description: Tsamba lathu litha kukulolani kuti musinthe zambiri zomwe timapeza kuchokera kwa inu, monga zolumikizana nazo. Mukhozanso kupempha kuti tikulitse zambiri zanu potumiza imelo kwa ife pa {emailLink}. Tsamba lathu litha kukulolani kuti musinthe zomwe mumakonda pa imelo.

Tikuyembekezanso kuti opereka chithandizo athu aziteteza zambiri momwemo. Palibe kutumiza kwa data pa intaneti, maukonde am'manja, kutumizira opanda zingwe kapena kusungirako zidziwitso pakompyuta, komabe, kutetezedwa 100%. Chonde dziwani kuti sitingatsimikizire zachitetezo chilichonse chomwe mungatitumizire.
Privacy.transfer_of_information_to_the_united_st: Ngati mukuchokera kudziko lomwe si la U.S., chonde dziwani kuti zambiri zomwe mumatumiza, kuphatikiza zomwe zaperekedwa kudzera pa Webusayiti yathu, zikutumizidwa ku United States. Malamulo oteteza deta ku United States akhoza kusiyana ndi a m’dziko limene mukukhala, ndipo zambiri zanu zikhoza kutsatiridwa ndi maboma, makhothi, kapena akuluakulu a boma ku United States malinga ndi malamulo a ku United States. Popereka zidziwitso zaumwini zotere, mukuvomera (ndipo mukuyimira kuti muli ndi ulamuliro kuvomera), kusamutsidwa kwa chidziwitsochi ku United States pakugwiritsa ntchito ndi zolinga zomwe zafotokozedwa mu Ndondomeko Yazinsinsi.

Mogwirizana ndi Child Online Privacy Protection Act, ngati taphunzira kuti tasonkhanitsa zambiri zaumwini kuchokera kwa mwana wosakwana zaka 13 popanda kutsimikizira chilolezo cha makolo, tidzachotsa chidziwitsocho mwamsanga. Ngati mukukhulupirira kuti titha kukhala ndi zidziwitso zilizonse kuchokera kwa mwana, chonde titumizireni pa {emailLink}.
